requirement_topic.en: SNI IEC 60034 safety and performance basis
requirement_topic.zh: SNI IEC 60034 安全与性能依据
requirement_topic.zht: SNI IEC 60034 安全與性能依據

summary.en: Indonesia uses SNI motor standards, including SNI 04-6865-2002 and SNI IEC 60034, for industrial AC motor safety and performance expectations. Covered motors should be documented against the Indonesian standard edition and certificate scope, including ratings, enclosure, insulation, duty, temperature rise, and marking.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚使用 SNI 04-6865-2002 和 SNI IEC 60034 等 SNI 电动机标准来规定工业交流电动机安全和性能预期。适用电动机应按印度尼西亚标准版本和证书范围建立文件，包括额定值、外壳、绝缘、工作制、温升和标识。
summary.zht: 印度尼西亞使用 SNI 04-6865-2002 和 SNI IEC 60034 等 SNI 電動機標準來規定工業交流電動機安全和性能預期。適用電動機應按印度尼西亞標準版本和證書範圍建立文件，包括額定值、外殼、絕緣、工作制、溫升和標識。

summary.en: China files usually include GB 18613 efficiency evidence, GB 12665 cooling-related evidence, factory routine tests, and CCC where below-1 kV motors are in CCC scope. These documents can support technical review but should be mapped to SNI IEC 60034 requirements.
summary.zh: 中国文件通常包括 GB 18613 能效证据、GB 12665 冷却相关证据、工厂例行测试，以及低压电动机在 CCC 范围内时的 CCC。上述文件可支持技术审查，但应映射至 SNI IEC 60034 要求。
summary.zht: 中國文件通常包括 GB 18613 能效證據、GB 12665 冷卻相關證據、工廠例行測試，以及低壓電動機在 CCC 範圍內時的 CCC。上述文件可支持技術審查，但應映射至 SNI IEC 60034 要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC for below-1 kV motors in CCC scope

gap.en: The technical standard family is IEC-aligned, but Indonesia requires certification under its SNI system for covered categories. China GB or CCC reports should be converted into an SNI IEC 60034 clause-by-clause file rather than submitted as a standalone substitute.
gap.zh: 技术标准体系与 IEC 对齐，但印度尼西亚对适用类别要求在其 SNI 体系下认证。中国 GB 或 CCC 报告应转换成 SNI IEC 60034 逐条款文件，而不是作为单独替代品提交。
gap.zht: 技術標準體系與 IEC 對齊，但印度尼西亞對適用類別要求在其 SNI 體系下認證。中國 GB 或 CCC 報告應轉換成 SNI IEC 60034 逐條款文件，而不是作為單獨替代品提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where covered by SNI certification scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China under applicable GB and CCC scope; not a direct Indonesia approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use China GB and CCC files as inputs, then build an Indonesia SNI IEC 60034 evidence pack tied to the exact model list and certificate scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可把中国 GB 和 CCC 文件作为输入，然后建立与具体型号清单和证书范围绑定的印度尼西亚 SNI IEC 60034 证据包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可把中國 GB 和 CCC 文件作為輸入，然後建立與具體型號清單和證書範圍綁定的印度尼西亞 SNI IEC 60034 證據包。

requirement_topic.en: Factory inspection and certificate scope control for SNI
requirement_topic.zh: SNI 的工厂检查与证书范围控制
requirement_topic.zht: SNI 的工廠檢查與證書範圍控制

summary.en: SNI certification for covered imported motors may require controlled factory identity, model grouping, testing, and certificate-scope management. Changes in model construction, ratings, factory site, or critical components should be assessed before shipment because they may fall outside the approved SNI scope.
summary.zh: 适用进口电动机的 SNI 认证可能要求受控的工厂身份、型号分组、测试和证书范围管理。型号结构、额定参数、工厂地点或关键部件变化在出货前应进行评估，因为可能超出已批准 SNI 范围。
summary.zht: 適用進口電動機的 SNI 認證可能要求受控的工廠身份、型號分組、測試和證書範圍管理。型號結構、額定參數、工廠地點或關鍵部件變化在出貨前應進行評估，因為可能超出已批准 SNI 範圍。

standards_or_laws: SNI certification process for covered motor products
KEMENDAG import controls for mandatory SNI goods

summary.en: Chinese factories often manage CCC and GB compliance by model family, factory site, and routine test controls. Those controls are useful but must be reconciled with the Indonesia SNI certificate holder, importer, and approved model scope.
summary.zh: 中国工厂通常按型号系列、工厂地点和例行测试控制来管理 CCC 和 GB 合规。这些控制有用，但必须与印度尼西亚 SNI 证书持有人、进口商和批准型号范围进行协调。
summary.zht: 中國工廠通常按型號系列、工廠地點和例行測試控制來管理 CCC 和 GB 合規。這些控制有用，但必須與印度尼西亞 SNI 證書持有人、進口商和批准型號範圍進行協調。

standards_or_laws: CCC factory and product-scope controls where applicable

gap.en: A model approved in a China certificate family may not automatically be inside the Indonesia SNI certificate family. Exporters should freeze bill of materials, ratings, nameplate content, and factory identity for Indonesia-certified models.
gap.zh: 在中国证书系列中获批的型号，不会自动落入印度尼西亚 SNI 证书系列。出口商应冻结印度尼西亚认证型号的物料清单、额定参数、铭牌内容和工厂身份。
gap.zht: 在中國證書系列中獲批的型號，不會自動落入印度尼西亞 SNI 證書系列。出口商應凍結印度尼西亞認證型號的物料清單、額定參數、銘牌內容和工廠身份。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory certificate-scope control for covered SNI products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory controls may exist under CCC or GB systems but do not define SNI scope

source.publisher: Ministry of Trade of the Republic of Indonesia (KEMENDAG)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Before shipment, confirm the exact motor model, factory, nameplate, and ratings are inside the Indonesia SNI certificate and Pertek import file. China certificate-family logic should not be assumed to carry over.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应确认具体电动机型号、工厂、铭牌和额定参数均在印度尼西亚 SNI 证书及 Pertek 进口文件范围内。不应假设中国证书系列逻辑可自动延伸。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應確認具體電動機型號、工廠、銘牌和額定參數均在印度尼西亞 SNI 證書及 Pertek 進口文件範圍內。不應假設中國證書系列邏輯可自動延伸。
